title: Best Fabric+ Minecraft
description:
A Vanilla+ stye pack.
✅More mobs
✅More Structures
✅Quests
✅Bosses
✅Quality Of life Changes.
body:
![The Logo Of Best Minecraft Fabric+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gRjkKxv7/images/4ad2079f4fe5eb73bd92d694d8a1d5a6a3d9f5b6.png)

![The minecraft overwold with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gRjkKxv7/images/0e2ed8d5d7785e089f948182ab2d504aaece2401.png)

| Fabric             | 1.20.1               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|

**Best Fabric+ Is a Vanilla+ style pack. Best Fabric+ is the extended version of better minecart with even more mods and features.**

# Features

- ✔️ Simple Quests to guide you.
- ✔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation (Oh The Biomes You'll Go, 
Geophilic, Promenade)     
- ✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support
- ✔️ New Bosses and Mobs (Bosses of Mass Destruction, Frostiful)
- ✔️ Hundreds of NEW Dungeons & Structures (When Dungeons Arise, Explorify, Repurposed Structures)
- ✔️ QoL Features such as Waystones
- ✔️ Xaero's Minimap with Additional Features
- ✔️ New Dimensions
- ✔️ **270+ Mods**
